nasb.text: The angel of God said to him, “Take the meat and the unleavened bread and lay them on this rock, and pour out the broth.” And he did so.

esv.text: And the angel of God said to him, “Take the meat and the unleavened cakes, and put them on this rock, and pour the broth over them.” And he did so.

cnv.text: 神的使者對基甸說：“把肉和無酵餅拿出來，擺在這塊磐石上，把湯倒出來。”他就這樣行了。

ccb.text: 上帝的天使对基甸说：“把肉和无酵饼放在这磐石上，把汤倒在上面。”他一一照做。
